title.en: APPARATUS FOR PROCESSING EXPOSED PHOTOGRAPHIC MATERIALS; ACCESSORIES THEREFOR

definition.ko: 노광될 사진재료의 처리용 장치 액체; 기체; 확산전사처리용 장치 G03D3/00; 5/00; 7/00; 9/00 반전처리장치 G03D11/00 기타 장치 및 부속품 G03D13/00 처리될 사진재료의 처리장치 G03D15/00 암실 G03D17/00

title.ko: 침지식, 습식 처리장치; 침지식의 수세장치(9/00, 11/00 우선)
title.en: Liquid processing apparatus involving immersion; Washing apparatus involving immersion (G03D0009000000, G03D0011000000 take precedence)
Details of liquid circulation
Liquid agitators
Liquid supply; Liquid circulation outside tanks
having progressive mechanical movement of exposed material
for plates, films, or prints held individually
for plates, films or prints spread onto belt conveyors
for long films or prints in the shape of strips, e.g. fed by roller assembly
with means for taking into account of elongation or contraction of films
Treating exposed material in original holder

title.ko: 침지식이 아닌 습식 처리장치 침지식이 아닌 수세장치 (9/00, 11/00 우선)
title.en: Liquid processing apparatus in which no immersion is effected; Washing apparatus in which no immersion is effected (G03D0009000000, G03D0011000000 take precedence)
using rupturable ampoules of liquid
using liquid sprays
Applicator pads, rollers, or strips
Gas processing apparatus
Diffusion development apparatus
using rupturable ampoules of liquid
Reversal processing apparatus

title.ko: 그룹 3/00 ～ 11/00에 포함되지 않는 장치 또는 그 부속품
title.en: Processing apparatus or accessories therefor, not covered by groups G03D0003000000-G03D0011000000
Containers; Holding-devices
Trays; Dishes; Tanks
Light-tight tanks with provision for loading in daylight

title.ko: 노광될 감광재료의 유지구; 노광될 감광재료의 지지구
title.en: Devices for holding exposed material; Devices for supporting exposed material
Clips (G03D0013140000 takes precedence)
Frames (G03D0013140000 takes precedence)
for holding films in spaced convolutions
Apparatus for treating processed material
Drying; Glazing (combined with processing apparatus G03D0003000000-G03D0013000000)
Cutting; Splicing
Applying varnish or other coating
Flattening prints

title.ko: 마운팅 예. 처리될 재료를 틀에 넣는 것(투영용 틀 G03B 21/64)
title.en: Mounting, e.g. of processed material in a frame (frames specially adapted for projection G03B0021640000)
Dark-room arrangements not provided for in the other groups of this subclass; Portable dark-rooms
